description_long: This object is a modern manual toothbrush with a slim, elongated handle and a rectangular brush head. The handle features a textured grip pattern, likely for improved ergonomics and slip resistance during use. The brush head is compact and densely packed with short, straight bristles arranged in parallel rows. The entire toothbrush appears to be a uniform light gray color, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. There are no visible logos, color accents, or decorative elements on the handle or head. The overall design suggests a focus on functionality and ease of cleaning.
description: A minimalist, light gray manual toothbrush with a textured handle and a compact, rectangular bristle head.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the toothbrush, with the rectangular bristle head and textured handle clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the slimness of the handle and the thickness of the brush head.
description_view_2: Top-down view focusing on the width of the handle and the arrangement of the bristles on the head.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, similar to view 1, showing the flatness and straightness of the handle and head.
attribute_bristle_arrangement: The bristles are arranged in several straight, parallel rows forming a rectangular cluster, with a uniform height and density. There are no visible multi-level or angled features.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is straight and slim with a textured grip pattern, providing ergonomic support and slip resistance. It lacks curves, thumb rests, or color accents.
